Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jun-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT COMPLETE PERSONAL LOGISTICS INC. Motion to Dismiss pursuant to Labor Code section 214. Appearances: Eric A. Grover, of Keller Grover LLP (415) 543-1305, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; David L. Jordan, of Livingston Law Firm (925) 952-9880, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Improper and untimely motion for change of venue. Order signed in open Court. Counsel to serve Order on opposing counsel. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
